title: Black Hole Sun

earnings.assumptions: Estimate assumes strong cross-generational rock streaming, sync familiarity, and songwriter-side participation.

ownership.master_owner: Likely legacy label-controlled masters with royalty participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing value appears tied to songwriter-side rights
ownership.notes: For major 1990s rock recordings, the artist-side share can be materially lower than gross listener demand suggests.

meaning_summary: This song holds value through a recognizable core riff or chorus, strong emotional payoff, and steady replay across catalog listening.
revenue_drivers: Classic replay value and catalog streaming keep major rock songs commercially relevant.
Playlist placement and cultural familiarity support long-tail listener demand.
Sync placements and live-culture recognition help extend the song's revenue life.
